title: Low-fat Energizing Turkish Ground Ginger Pilaf
description: A light and flavorful turkish dish featuring ground ginger, perfect for a quick energizing meal. Serve hot in a banana leaf wrapper for a complete experience.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add 1 small onion, finely chopped, and sauté until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add 2 cloves of minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add 1 tablespoon of grated fresh ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add 1 cup of uncooked long-grain rice and stir to coat in oil and mix with spices.,
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-18 minutes, or until rice is tender and fluffy.
